name: Qatar Insurance Company Q.S.P.C.
summary: Qatar Insurance Company Q.S.P.C., together with its subsidiaries, provides insurance, reinsurance, real estate, and financial advisory services. It operates through six segments: Marine & Aviation Insurance, Property & Casualty Insurance, Health & Life Insurance, Real Estate, Advisory, and Investments. The company offers personal insurance products, including car, home, travel, boat, motorcycle, and life and medical; and business insurance products, such as energy, marine and aviation, property and commercial, and motor fleet. It is also involved in the investment activities; management of property; and provision of IT and related services. The company operates in the State of Qatar, the United Arab Emirates, the Sultanate of Oman, the State of Kuwait, the United Kingdom, Switzerland, Bermuda, Singapore, Cayman Islands, Gibraltar, Italy, Jersey, and Malta. Qatar Insurance Company Q.S.P.C. was founded in 1964 and is headquartered in Doha, Qatar.
